title: [Cloud] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Connect Flamingo/Spoonbill headset as standalone (not paired with Charge Case) and verify cloud web page displays device as "Voyager Legend 50" or "Voyager Legend 30" with only earpiece info and image.
steps: Pair headset with the app -> device appears in app.
Go to cloud web page and find device -> device displayed as 'Voyager Legend 50' or 'Voyager Legend 30'.
Click on device on cloud to open details page -> details show only earpiece info, image shows only earpiece.
expected: Details show only earpiece info, image shows only earpiece.
